seed: Ars Therapeutica — structural therapy design pipeline using 12-primitive grammar to diagnose disease deltas and apply TENSOR/MEET operations for therapeutic correction
target: The unified Ars pentology — Phytoglyphica (147 plants) × Fungiglyphica (86 fungi) × Animaglyphica (80 animals) × Therapeutica (10 therapies), all structurally typed and Frobenius-verified, forming a single categorical object where natural compounds route through therapy design
clink_morphisms: Therapy pipeline execution (level 0) generates a verified therapy instance and its natural compound prescriptions via TENSOR/MEET operations, establishing initial routing morphisms (level 1)

Individual therapy-compound systems (level 1) aggregate into domain-specific categories (Phytoglyphica/Fungiglyphica/Animaglyphica/Therapeutica) via colimit, constructing Frobenius structure and compound-therapy mappings (level 2)

Product of quadripartita categories (level 2) with universal routing morphisms integrates natural compounds and therapies into a unified Frobenius object via categorical product and delta-correction functors (level 3)
